syntax_7818.description: Disguises the specified entity into another entity
syntax_7818.syntax_pattern:

set %entities%'[s] dis(g|k)uise to %disguise/entitydata/string% [(for|to) %players%] [for %timespan%]

en: Disguises the specified entity into another entity

syntax_7843.creator: _tud
syntax_7843.title: Disguise - Item Stack
syntax_7843.description:
Set or get the item of a disguise.
For Dropped Item Disguises, it returns the item of it.
For Item Frame Disguises, it returns the item inside the frame.
For throwable projectiles (eggs, snowballs, enderpearls, etc.), it returns the displayed item.
Other disguises don't have items associated with them.

en:
Set or get the item of a disguise.
For Dropped Item Disguises, it returns the item of it.
For Item Frame Disguises, it returns the item inside the frame.
For throwable projectiles (eggs, snowballs, enderpearls, etc.), it returns the displayed item.
Other disguises don't have items associated with them.
